title: Telephone Courtesies & Effectiveness
subtitle: A customer-facing skills workshop for improving telephone courtesies & effectiveness performance and consistency.
whyThisMatters: Telephone Courtesies & Effectiveness helps participants turn course concepts into practical workplace habits. The programme gives teams a shared foundation, clearer language, and guided practice so they can connect the subject to customer trust, communication, and consistent service delivery and apply the learning with more confidence after the workshop.
builtFor: Employees who manage customer conversations or expectations
walkAwayWith: Use clearer service or sales behaviors in everyday interactions.
Respond to difficult moments with more structure and confidence.
Align practical standards across the team.

modules.title: The Importance of Excellent Telephone Skills
Passive, assertive and aggressive caller communication styles

methodologyCaption: Participants practise workplace conversations and customer-facing scenarios through role-play, feedback, and group reflection.
